recommendations.title: Infelici e contenti
recommendations.overview: Aldo and Vittorio are two men suffering from disabilities. One is blind, the other is forced to a wheelchair. Vittorio one day by chance meets Aldo in the hospice and invites him to take a pleasure trip to Sanremo in Liguria. In fact Vittorio, though

recommendations.title: Christmas in Love
recommendations.overview: A middle-aged man’s relationship with a young model is questioned by his daughter, who’s dating an older man herself.

recommendations.title: Fratelli d'Italia
recommendations.overview: Three episodes held together by a common element: a car rented by three different characters.

recommendations.title: Body Guards
recommendations.overview: Fabio Leone and Paolo Pecora are two police officers from Rome, who, together with the careless Neapolitan Ciro Marmotta, are fired from the barracks due their scuppering of a plan to capture a secret agent.

recommendations.title: Tifosi
recommendations.overview: Four different stories about italian football team’s supporter.

recommendations.title: Fracchia The Human Beast
recommendations.overview: The world's greatest criminal and the world greatest loser share the same face... now they'll share the same life!

recommendations.title: Fantozzi to the Rescue
recommendations.overview: Fantozzi is now retired but continues to go to the office where it is held up as a fine example of employees intending to do career.

recommendations.title: Paparazzi
recommendations.overview: A  montley group of free-lance photographers are desperate to grab a good shot of a celebrity.

recommendations.title: Fantozzi Against the Wind
recommendations.overview: The third film in the saga of the unlucky clerk Ugo Fantozzi, played by its creator, Paolo Villaggio.

recommendations.title: Natale da chef
recommendations.overview: A bizarre group consisting of a refined chef with unusual recipes, an assistant cook with taste disturbances and an improvised pastry chef takes part in a competition between chefs to win the contract for the G7.
